parents.subject: LU-17022 obdclass: convert still more flags to bitops

commit.subject: LU-17022 obdclass: change further flags to bitops
commit.message:
LU-17022 obdclass: change further flags to bitops

	obd_fail:1,		/* cleanup with failover */
	obd_no_conn:1,		/* deny new connections */
	obd_inactive:1,		/* device active/inactive
				 * (for /proc/status only!!) */

are now

	OBDF_FAIL,		/* cleanup with failover */
	OBDF_NO_CONN,		/* deny new connections */
	OBDF_INACTIVE,		/* device active/inactive
				 * (for /proc/status only!!) */

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Mr NeilBrown <neilb@suse.de>
Change-Id: Ia981cae988ff9ab69951c1ff30196686ec2d65b0
